response.justification: Strong individual-contributor background spanning 15+ years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with solid testing/TDD culture, but the resume shows no people-management experience, no formal technical leadership title, and no work on developer-productivity domains like build systems, compilers, or test automation infrastructure at scale. Mobile platform exposure is limited to a single Apple TV/iOS handover years ago. This role explicitly requires 2+ years people management and 3+ years in dev-tools — both are missing.
strengths: Deep multi-language engineering breadth (TS/Node, DLang, C/C++, Java) with TDD and CI/CD discipline
Track record of building tools, frameworks, and workshops (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos)
Staff-level title and long tenure showing technical maturity and ownership
concerns: No people-management or direct-reports experience evidenced anywhere on the resume
No build-systems / compiler / large-scale test-infrastructure work for a mobile ecosystem
Mobile platform exposure is thin and dated (one Apple TV/iOS stint ~2015–2016)

key_factors.factor: No developer-tools/build-systems background at required depth
Strong engineering craftsmanship and tooling side-projects
